title: Mirror column automate copy to a normal column (text or number)
excerpt: Is there a way to create an automation where we can copy the result from a mirrored column of a board connection to a regular text or numbers column?

posts.author: ilg-comex (Iluska)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to create an automation where we can copy the result from a mirrored column of a board connection to a regular text or numbers column?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ilg-comex

There is an app that does this, more info from @Shamika_Khedkar from Work Perfect.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ilg-comex

Column Magic is an app that enables many powerful functions including that.

Jim - The Monday Man

posts.author: Shamika_Khedkar (Shamika )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ilg-comex ,
M2R can solve this problem. M2R essentially copies values from mirrored columns tonative columns. Here’s a quick explainer

Let me know if this solves your problem.

Best,

posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to copy the mirror column data over to a new column. For example, if I copy a mirror column, I want to be able to see all the information pertaining to that item in a ID form view?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! You can use the Column to Column app to copy mirror columns to standard columns. We’ve introduced new powerful templates to address that use case.

mirror-support1432×615 53.6 KB

Pricing is based solely on the number of seats, the usage is unlimited.
